item.title: I'm Just a Bill: 2024 Farm Bill Reauthorization
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — 2024 Farm Bill Reauthorization

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

The Farm Bill is reauthorized roughly every five years. It bundles agricultural commodity programs, conservation, rural development, crop insurance, and — by spending share, the largest chunk — the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP / food stamps). The 2018 Farm Bill expired and a 2024 reauthorization is in active consideration in the 119th Congress.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Disaster SNAP Emergency Authorization
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Disaster SNAP Emergency Authorization

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Disaster-SNAP (D-SNAP) program expansion in the 119th Congress. D-SNAP provides temporary food assistance to households affected by federally-declared disasters; current proposals expand eligibility, streamline application, and increase per-household amounts.

What does it actually do?

  • Streamlined eligibility — automatic D-SNAP enrollment for current SNAP recipients in disaster areas
  • Application simplification — single-form application; mobile-accessible
  • Benefit duration — extends D-SNAP duration for prolonged-impact disasters
  • Hot foods — explicitly allows D-SNAP for hot-prepared foods in disaster areas (often the only food available)
  • Coordination with disaster relief — composes with FEMA Individual Assistance

Who votes when?

  • House Agriculture + Senate Agriculture active consideration

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes directly with #1 Lets Make Dinner Freezer Host network (cooperative-class food infrastructure for members in disaster-affected areas) and #2 Lets Get Groceries local supply chain. Disaster-SNAP modernization makes the federal floor work better for cooperative-class members in crisis.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: SNAP Modernization Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — SNAP Modernization Act

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Modernization of the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP / food stamps) in the 119th Congress — addressing benefit adequacy, eligibility administration, and program structure separate from the broader Farm Bill reauthorization.

What does it actually do?

  • Benefit adequacy: Updates the Thrifty Food Plan calculation methodology
  • Administrative streamlining: Reduces categorical eligibility friction across state programs
  • Work requirements: Modifies (expands or contracts depending on version) work-requirement provisions
  • Hot foods purchase: Some versions allow SNAP at prepared-foods retailers
  • Online purchasing: Expands SNAP online-purchase access

Who votes when?

  • House Agriculture + Senate Agriculture active consideration

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

SNAP composes directly with #1 Lets Make Dinner Freezer Host network and #2 Lets Get Groceries city-chapter cooperatives. Hot foods + online purchasing provisions could allow SNAP usage at cooperative-class Freezer Hosts and cooperative grocery chapters.
